zh.lifeSummary: 當William Faxon於1555年出生在英國奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福時，他的父親Richard Faxon25歲，母親Elizabeth Sheppard20歲。他於1575年與Ellen在英國英格蘭奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他去世於1613年8月30日在英國奧可福爾享年58歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Faxon于1555年出生在英国奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福时，他的父亲Richard Faxon25岁，母亲Elizabeth Sheppard20岁。他于1575年与Ellen在英国英格兰奧可福爾斯瓦爾可利福结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他去世于1613年8月30日在英国奧可福爾享年58岁。

nameMeanings.name: Faxon
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: Warwickshire dialect variant of Foxon, which is either a patronymic from the Middle English personal name Folk (see Foulkes ) or a habitational name from Foxton in Leicestershire.

variants.name: Fawson
meanings: English: probably a variant of   Faxon  .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When William Faxon was born in 1555, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, his father, Richard Faxon, was 25 and his mother, Elizabeth Sheppard, was 20. He married Ellen in 1575, in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. He died on 30 August 1613, in Oxfordshire, England, at the age of 58.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Faxon est né en 1555, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, son père, Richard Faxon, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Sheppard, avait 20 ans. Il a épousé Ellen en 1575, à Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Il est décédé le 30 août 1613, à Oxfordshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 58 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Faxon 1555 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Richard Faxon 25 und seine Mutter Elizabeth Sheppard 20. Er hat 1575 in Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, United Kingdom Ellen geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. Er starb am 30. August 1613 im Alter von 58 Jahren in Oxfordshire, England.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Faxon è nato il nel 1555 nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, England, il suo padre, Richard Faxon, aveva 25 anni e il suo madre, Elizabeth Sheppard, aveva 20 anni. Lui sposato Ellen nel 1575, nel Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Morì il 30 agosto 1613, nel Oxfordshire, England, all'età di 58 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William Faxonが1555年にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフで生まれた時，父Richard Faxonは25歳，母Elizabeth Sheppardは20歳であった。1575年にイギリスイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアスワルクリフでEllenと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。彼は1613年8月30日にイギリスオクスフォードシュアイアで58歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William Faxon(이)가 1555년 영국 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Richard Faxon(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Elizabeth Sheppard(은)는 20세였다. 그는 1575년 영국 잉글랜드 스퍼드실르 스월c리프에서 Ellen(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그는 1613년 8월 30일 영국 스퍼드실르에서 58세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Faxon nasceu em 1555, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Faxon, tinha 25 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Sheppard, tinha 20 anos. Ele casou-se com Ellen em 1575, em Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Ele faleceu em 30 de agosto de 1613, em Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, com 58 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Faxon родился в 1555 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, его отцу по имени Richard Faxon было 25 лет, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Sheppard, 20. Он женился на женщине по имени Ellen в 1575 г. в местности свалклифф, оксфордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Он умер 30 августа 1613 г. в местности оксфордшир, Англия в возрасте 58 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Faxon nació en 1555, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Faxon, tenía 25 años y su mamá, Elizabeth Sheppard, tenía 20 años. Se casó con Ellen en 1575, en Swalcliffe, Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. Murió el 30 de agosto de 1613, en Oxfordshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 58 años.
